summary: P0 Bug Fixed: 'Failed to save description settings' error in Bulk Category Editor. Root cause was ReferenceError - variable 'descriptionUpdateMode' was not defined. Fixed by changing to 'applyUpdateMode' which is the correct state variable.

bug_details.symptom: Toast error 'Failed to save description settings' when clicking 'Apply Description to X Products' button
bug_details.root_cause: ReferenceError: descriptionUpdateMode is not defined at line 1748 in saveBulkDescriptionSettings function
bug_details.fix: Changed 'descriptionUpdateMode' to 'applyUpdateMode' (the correct existing state variable from line 233)

steps: Click 'Edit Categories' to open Bulk Category Editor
Fill description template with 'Test description for {name}'
test_verification.before_fix: CONSOLE [error]: ReferenceError: descriptionUpdateMode is not defined

critical_code_review_comments: Bug was a simple typo - 'descriptionUpdateMode' should have been 'applyUpdateMode'
The component already had 'applyUpdateMode' state defined at line 233
No other issues found with the bulk description functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Description Settings save functionality in Supplier Products page now working. The fix was a simple variable name correction from 'descriptionUpdateMode' to 'applyUpdateMode' at line 1748.

rca_of_the_issue.summary: Variable reference error - nonexistent variable 'descriptionUpdateMode' was used instead of existing state variable 'applyUpdateMode'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Changed line 1748 from 'update_mode: descriptionUpdateMode' to 'update_mode: applyUpdateMode'
